title: TMDB Keyword Lexicon — NRC Emotion + VAD + SCL Valence Scores
subtitle: 67,916 TMDB keywords scored against NRC affect lexicons + SCL phrase-level valence hierarchy
description:
One row per unique keyword phrase from the TMDB movies dataset (~1.24M theatrical releases), joined to NRC affective lexicons and SCL sentiment composition lexicons by Saif M. Mohammad (NRC Canada).

## What's new in v2

Added phrase-level valence columns from the Sentiment Composition Lexicons (SCL):

- **SCL-OPP** — opposing-polarity phrases (e.g. `happy accident`, `bad luck`)
- **SCL-NMA** — negator/modal/adverb phrases (e.g. `not bad`, `barely good`)

These are joined using a valence hierarchy that selects the most specific score available:

```
valence_source precedence: opp > nma > vad > token_mean
```

This fixes the known limitation of token-level averaging for phrases with mixed polarity.

## Columns (32 total)

| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| `keyword` | Raw TMDB keyword phrase |
| `n_movies` | Number of TMDB movies using this keyword |
| `emolex_found` | Found in NRC Emotion Lexicon |
| `intensity_found` | Found in NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon |
| `vad_found` | Found in NRC VAD v2.1 |
| `emolex_anger` … `emolex_negative` | Binary union across tokens (8 emotions + pos/neg) |
| `intensity_anger` … `intensity_disgust` | Mean intensity across matched tokens (0–1) |
| `vad_valence` | Mean keyword valence, bipolar −1 to +1 (NRC VAD v2.1, token-mean) |
| `vad_arousal` | Mean keyword arousal, bipolar −1 to +1 |
| `vad_dominance` | Mean keyword dominance, bipolar −1 to +1 |
| `valence` | **Best available valence** following OPP > NMA > VAD > token_mean hierarchy |
| `valence_source` | Which lexicon supplied the valence (`opp`/`nma`/`vad`/`token_mean`) |
| `valence_count` | Number of lexicons with a score for this term (0–3) |
| `valence_variance` | Variance across lexicon scores (null if only 1 source — use as confidence signal) |
| `matched_tokens` | Tokens with a valence score (relevant for `token_mean` fallback) |
| `total_tokens` | Total tokens in keyword |

## Lexicon rules

- **EmoLex (binary):** union across tokens — if any token has `fear=1`, the keyword gets `emolex_fear=1`
- **Intensity:** mean across matched tokens (token-level lemmatization via NLTK WordNet)
- **VAD v2.1:** full-phrase MWE lookup first, then token mean
- **SCL-OPP / SCL-NMA:** exact phrase lookup; OPP takes precedence over NMA when both match
- **token_mean fallback:** mean of hierarchy-selected unigram `valence` scores (not raw VAD)

## Coverage

| Lexicon | Keywords matched | % |
|---|---|---|
| NRC Emotion Lexicon (EmoLex) | 37,678 | 55.5% |
| NRC Emotion Intensity | 21,405 | 31.5% |
| NRC VAD v2.1 | 44,606 | 65.7% |
| `valence` (any source) | 38,511 | 56.7% |

## Data provenance

Keywords extracted from: [asaniczka/tmdb-movies-dataset-2023-930k-movies](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/asaniczka/tmdb-movies-dataset-2023-930k-movies) (sourced from TMDb API). Adult-labeled movies excluded.

NRC Lexicons: [saifmohammad.com/WebPages/lexicons.html](https://saifmohammad.com/WebPages/lexicons.html)

SCL Lexicons: [saifmohammad.com/WebPages/SCL.html](https://www.saifmohammad.com/WebPages/SCL.html)

## Related datasets

- [TMDB Movie VAD + Emotion Scores](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/bdelanghe/tmdb-movie-vad-emotion-scores) — movie-level aggregation of these keyword scores

**Source pipeline:** [github.com/bdelanghe/imdb-kaggle](https://github.com/bdelanghe/imdb-kaggle)

resources.description: 67,916 unique TMDB keyword phrases with NRC EmoLex, Intensity, VAD v2.1, and SCL phrase-level valence scores. One row per keyword.

fields.name: keyword
fields.description: Raw TMDB keyword phrase (e.g. 'child abuse', 'space marine')

fields.name: n_movies
fields.description: Number of TMDB movies tagged with this keyword

fields.name: emolex_found
fields.description: True if any token matched NRC Emotion Lexicon

fields.name: intensity_found
fields.description: True if any token matched NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon

fields.name: vad_found
fields.description: True if phrase or any token matched NRC VAD v2.1

fields.name: emolex_anger
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token associates with anger (binary union)

fields.name: emolex_anticipation
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token associates with anticipation

fields.name: emolex_disgust
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token associates with disgust

fields.name: emolex_fear
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token associates with fear

fields.name: emolex_joy
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token associates with joy

fields.name: emolex_sadness
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token associates with sadness

fields.name: emolex_surprise
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token associates with surprise

fields.name: emolex_trust
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token associates with trust

fields.name: emolex_positive
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token is positive-sentiment

fields.name: emolex_negative
fields.description: NRC EmoLex: 1 if any token is negative-sentiment

fields.name: intensity_anger
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean anger intensity across matched tokens (0–1)

fields.name: intensity_anticipation
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean anticipation intensity (0–1)

fields.name: intensity_disgust
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean disgust intensity (0–1)

fields.name: intensity_fear
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean fear intensity (0–1)

fields.name: intensity_joy
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean joy intensity (0–1)

fields.name: intensity_sadness
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean sadness intensity (0–1)

fields.name: intensity_surprise
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean surprise intensity (0–1)

fields.name: intensity_trust
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean trust intensity (0–1)

fields.name: vad_valence
fields.description: NRC VAD v2.1: mean keyword valence, bipolar −1 (negative) to +1 (positive). MWE-first lookup, then token mean.

fields.name: vad_arousal
fields.description: NRC VAD v2.1: mean keyword arousal, bipolar −1 (calm) to +1 (excited)

fields.name: vad_dominance
fields.description: NRC VAD v2.1: mean keyword dominance, bipolar −1 (submissive) to +1 (dominant)

fields.name: valence
fields.description: Best available bipolar valence [−1, +1] following OPP > NMA > VAD > token_mean hierarchy

fields.name: valence_source
fields.description: Source of valence: opp (SCL-OPP), nma (SCL-NMA), vad (NRC VAD exact), token_mean (unigram mean fallback)

fields.name: valence_count
fields.description: Number of lexicons (0–3) with a valence score for this term. Higher = more confident.

fields.name: valence_variance
fields.description: Variance across lexicon valence scores. Non-null only when valence_count >= 2. High variance = lexicons disagree.

fields.name: matched_tokens
fields.description: Number of tokens with a valence score (relevant for token_mean source)

fields.name: total_tokens
fields.description: Total word count of keyword phrase
